confirmed_blockers.public_example: How does the selected date change the observation context?
confirmed_blockers.recon_question: How does the selected date change temporal pressure?
confirmed_blockers.root_cause: The envelope classifier checks change/memory keywords before temporal/pressure keywords, while the composer uses a separate lens precedence. The word 'change' captures the temporal example as change_memory.
confirmed_blockers.required_repair: Unify or explicitly reconcile the two classifiers and lock the public temporal example to temporal_pressure routing.

confirmed_blockers.observed_result: Complete three-zone read rendered with 01 Jan 2030 as Observation.
confirmed_blockers.root_cause: normalizeObservationDate validates calendar syntax only and has no date <= current UTC boundary.
confirmed_blockers.boundary_conflict: The public product labels the field as an observation and asserts no forecast.
confirmed_blockers.required_repair: Reject dates after current UTC date before temporal execution and return the existing distinct input failure state.

harness_false_positives_excluded: root_brand_shell failed only because browser body text was uppercase while the assertion was case-sensitive; SSR shell check passed.
Several primary-route assertions expected route tuple order, while the visual nodes preserve canonical module index order; module membership was correct except for the temporal example.
public-boundary body-text assertion inspected collapsed details; boundary content remains present in DOM/source proof.
